content.json:
# 1PhoneMirror — Usage

Launches (opt-in /ping) and downloads (/dl redirector). All data anonymous.
Use the time range below — it applies to every chart.

content.query:
let base = customEvents | where name == 'Launch';
union
  (base | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = 'Launches'),
  (base | summarize Value = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.install_id)) | extend Metric = 'Distinct installs'),
  (base | summarize Value = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.version)) | extend Metric = 'Versions seen')
| project Metric, Value
content.title: Launches · distinct installs · versions seen

content.query:
let base = customEvents | where name == 'Download';
union
  (base | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = 'Downloads'),
  (base | summarize Value = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.version)) | extend Metric = 'Versions'),
  (base | summarize Value = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.file)) | extend Metric = 'Files')
| project Metric, Value
content.title: Downloads via /dl redirector

content.json:
## App launches over time
Total `Launch` events per bucket. Each desktop install pings once per process startup (when the user has the opt-in toggle on). Adjust the **Bin** parameter for granularity.

content.query: customEvents | where name == 'Launch' | summarize Launches = count() by bin(timestamp, totimespan('{Bin}')) | render columnchart
content.title: App starts per bin

content.query: customEvents | where name == 'Launch' | summarize Launches = count(), Installs = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.install_id)) by bin(timestamp, totimespan('{Bin}')) | render timechart
content.title: Launches vs. distinct installs over time

content.query: customEvents | where name == 'Launch' | extend hod = hourofday(timestamp), dow = case(dayofweek(timestamp)==0d,'Sun',dayofweek(timestamp)==1d,'Mon',dayofweek(timestamp)==2d,'Tue',dayofweek(timestamp)==3d,'Wed',dayofweek(timestamp)==4d,'Thu',dayofweek(timestamp)==5d,'Fri','Sat') | summarize Launches = count() by dow, hod | order by hod asc
content.title: When users launch the app (hour-of-day x day-of-week)

content.query: customEvents | where name == 'Launch' | summarize Launches = count(), Installs = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.install_id)) by Version = tostring(customDimensions.version) | order by Version asc
content.title: Launches by app version

content.query: customEvents | where name == 'Launch' | summarize Launches = count() by Version = tostring(customDimensions.version), bin(timestamp, totimespan('{Bin}')) | render timechart
content.title: Launches per version over time

content.query: customEvents | where name == 'Launch' | summarize Launches = count(), Installs = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.install_id)) by OsBuild = tostring(customDimensions.os_build) | order by Launches desc | take 20
content.title: Windows build distribution (top 20, by launches)

content.json:
## Downloads (/dl redirector)
Counts every redirect served by the Azure Function — winget, browser, curl, PowerShell, etc.

content.query: customEvents | where name == 'Download' | summarize Downloads = count() by bin(timestamp, totimespan('{Bin}')), Client = tostring(customDimensions.client) | render columnchart with (kind=stacked)
content.title: Downloads over time (stacked by client)

content.query: customEvents | where name == 'Download' | summarize Downloads = count() by Client = tostring(customDimensions.client) | order by Downloads desc
content.title: Downloads by client

content.query: customEvents | where name == 'Download' | summarize Downloads = count() by Version = tostring(customDimensions.version) | order by Version desc
content.title: Downloads by version

content.query: customEvents | where name in ('Launch','Download') | project timestamp, name, version=tostring(customDimensions.version), install_id=tostring(customDimensions.install_id), os_build=tostring(customDimensions.os_build), client=tostring(customDimensions.client), file=tostring(customDimensions.file) | order by timestamp desc | take 100
content.title: Latest events
